signals.headline: RIPPLE LAUNCHES UNIFIED TREASURY SYSTEM MERGING SWIFT AND XRP RAILS | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RIPPLE LAUNCHES UNIFIED TREASURY SYSTEM MERGING SWIFT AND XRP RAILS | YES | HIGH confidence**

Ripple has launched a **new Unified Treasury System** (announced April 13, 2026) that merges SWIFT and XRP payment rails, targeting corporate adoption for payments and liquidity[7]. This represents a concrete step toward institutional use cases.

The network's **Alpenglow consensus upgrade** aims to reduce transaction finality from 12 seconds to just 150 milliseconds[3]. SOL surged approximate

signals.headline: XRP LEADS DIGITAL ASSET INFLOWS WITH $119
signals.raw:
XRP LEADS DIGITAL ASSET INFLOWS WITH $119.6 MILLION | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP recorded its **strongest weekly inflow since mid-December 2025 at $119.6 million**, unseating both Bitcoin and Solana[4]. This inflow is approximately **4x larger than Solana's $34.9 million**[8], signaling stronger institutional interest in XRP.

signals.headline: SEC CLARITY ACT ROUNDTABLE SCHEDULED FOR APRIL 16 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC CLARITY ACT ROUNDTABLE SCHEDULED FOR APRIL 16 | YES | HIGH confidence**

The SEC has officially scheduled a landmark **roundtable discussion for April 16, 2026** on the CLARITY Act[7]. This legislation aims to resolve which regulatory agency oversees digital assets and establish a framework for U.S. crypto markets—a major potential catalyst for both XRP and Solana sentiment[7].
